zh.lifeSummary: 當John Eccles 4th Laird of Kildonan於1378年出生在英國蘇格蘭諾斯 艾斯爾吉爾莫利時，他的父親Mattheus de Eyckles 3rd Laird of Kildonan41歲，母親Mrs Mattheus De Eyckles29歲。他和Mrs John Eccles至少有2個兒子。他去世於1449年享年71歲。

nameMeanings.name: Eccles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Eccles in Lancashire, or possibly from any of several other places so named in Kent, Norfolk, Berwickshire, and Dumfriesshire, from British eglēs ‘Romano-British Christian church’ (from Latin ecclesia, Greek ekklēsia ‘gathering, assembly’). Such places would have been the sites of notable pre-Anglo-Saxon churches or Christian places of communal worship.

variants.name: Exley
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from Exley in Southowram (Yorkshire), from British eglēs ‘Romano-British Christian church’ (from Latin ecclesia, Greek ekklēsia ‘gathering, assembly’) + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Eccles .
Americanized form of South German   Oechsle  .

variants.name: Echols
meanings: Altered form of English   Eccles   and possibly also of German   Eckels  .

variants.name: Eckles
meanings: English: variant of   Eccles  . This form is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When John Eccles 4th Laird of Kildonan was born in 1378, in Kilmory, North Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Mattheus de Eyckles 3rd Laird of Kildonan, was 41 and his mother, Mrs Mattheus De Eyckles, was 29. He had at least 2 sons with Mrs John Eccles. He died in 1449, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Eccles 4th Laird of Kildonan est né en 1378, à Kilmory, North Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Mattheus d’Eyckles 3rd Laird of Kildonan, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Mrs Mattheus De Eyckles, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Mrs John Eccles. Il est décédé en 1449, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Eccles 4th Laird of Kildonan 1378 in Kilmory, North Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Mattheus de Eyckles 3rd Laird of Kildonan 41 und seine Mutter Mrs Mattheus De Eyckles 29. Er hatte mit Mrs John Eccles mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1449 im Alter von 71 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Eccles 4th Laird of Kildonan è nato il nel 1378 nel Kilmory, North Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Mattheus de Eyckles 3rd Laird of Kildonan, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Mattheus De Eyckles, aveva 29 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Mrs John Eccles. Morì nel 1449, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Eccles 4th Laird of Kildonanが1378年にイギリススコットランドノース エイルシュアイアキルモーイで生まれた時，父Mattheus de Eyckles 3rd Laird of Kildonanは41歳，母Mrs Mattheus De Eycklesは29歳であった。彼はMrs John Ecclesとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1449年に71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Eccles 4th Laird of Kildonan(이)가 1378년 영국 스코틀랜드 노르스 에이르실르 킬모리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Mattheus de Eyckles 3rd Laird of Kildonan(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Mattheus De Eyckles(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Mrs John Eccles(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1449년 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Eccles 4th Laird of Kildonan nasceu em 1378, em Kilmory, North Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Mattheus de Eyckles 3rd Laird of Kildonan, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Mattheus De Eyckles, tinha 29 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Eccles 4th Laird of Kildonan родился в 1378 г. в местности килмори, норт аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Mattheus de Eyckles 3rd Laird of Kildonan было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs Mattheus De Eyckles, 29. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Mrs John Eccles. Он умер в 1449 г. в возрасте 71 год.
